Odoo Student Diploma

  • The Diploma is NOMINATIVE and it can not be transferred to another account after its completion. Make sure to be connected with the right user before attempting this exam.
  • The exam will cover the following subjects: Purchase, Sales, CRM, Projects, Inventory, Manufacturing, Human Resources and Accounting.
  • You’ll have 1 hour to complete this 80-questions exam.
  • You must score at least 70% to PASS.
    • Each CORRECT answer is worth 1 point.
    • Each WRONG answer is worth -0.5 point.
    • Each UNANSWERED question is worth 0 point.

Time limit for this certification: 1 hour

or press Enter
Powered by Odoo ›

Introduction into Odoo

1. What are the different user types?

2. If we have multiple languages in the system, can users select their own preferred language?

3. How can you link an existing user to an existing employee?

4. Which view is not included in Odoo?

5. How can you define the generic units of measure for the database?

6. Can you synchronize Odoo's calendar with Google or Outlook calendar?

7. How many measures can you select for graph reporting?

8. Can you assign more than 1 email to 1 user?

9. What does this icon represent?

10. In Kanban view, what does it mean when a card has a green Activities icon?

or press CTRL+Enter

✅ Answer Key

1. Internal, portal and public

2. Yes

3. Through employees app

4. Box

5. In the settings under the units of measure section

6. Yes with Google and Outlook calendars

7. Unlimited

8. No

9. Activity view

10. The record has an upcoming activity scheduled with a future due date

Procurement

11. Assume that the on-hand quantity of product is below the minimum quantity. What is the condition for the system to trigger the "buy" re-ordering rule?

12. If the base unit of measure of a product is in kgs and the purchase unit of measure is in grams and we bought 1000 grams of the product, the system will store it as:

13. In a blanket order, can you order more than what's agreed on?

14. While editing a product, sometimes the purchase tab is not visible. Why?

15. How can you select which warehouse to receive the purchased products into?

16. How to prevent users from editing products quantity, cost and adding new lines to confirm purchase order?

17. What is the arrival field on the purchase order?

18. If the costing method is set to average costing, when does the cost of the product get updated?

19. How can you create new agreement types?

20. If the number of items received on a PO is less than the number of items ordered from a vendor, which of the following options could happen?

or press CTRL+Enter

✅ Answer Key

11. To set a vendor on the product form

12. 1 kg

13. Yes

14. Vendor tab is only visible when the Purchase application is downloaded and purchase box is ticked

15. From the deliver to field after enabling storage locations option

16. Locking the purchase order

17. The validation date and time of the first receipt order

18. After receiving the product

19. Agreement types in the settings

20. New backorder is generated, prompting the system to assign 2 receipts to the same PO. (If backorder option was enabled)

Sales / CRM

21. In your CRM, can the Lead Mining functionality be used if the Leads setting is not selected?

22. How do you schedule an activity for an opportunity from the main CRM dashboard (in Kanban view)?

23. How does Odoo handle Lost opportunities in the pipeline?

24. In your CRM, how can you have different pipelines for different teams?

25. A Pricelist...

26. What do the colors at the top of each column in the CRM represent?

27. What actions can you define for the various CRM stages?

28. Can you have new leads from your website?

29. Where can you find the reporting of quotations?

30. Which invoicing policy would you use to invoice a customer based on the number of hours worked?

or press CTRL+Enter

✅ Answer Key

21. Yes, the leads will be generated as opportunities

22. Click the "clock" icon on the Kanban card of the opportunity

23. Archives them

24. By creating different Sales Teams, create the stages in the pipelines for each team, and assign the different stages to their dedicated team

25. Can be changed from the Sale order

26. The stages of the activities (today, planned, overdue)

27. All of the above

28. Yes, from the Contact us page by creating an opportunity and configured the right actions for the form

29. Sales > Reporting > Sales > Filter = Quotations

30. Based on timesheets

Project Management

31. Can you automate creating a project or task from a sales order line?

32. How can you record project updates and check project progress?

33. If you sell a service to a customer and the invoicing policy of the service is based on timesheets, is the customer able to check the usage of the service time?

34. How can you track revenues and expenses of the project?

35. What does this symbol represent?

36. How can you record a timesheet on a task?

37. When invoicing a project based on timesheets, can you select a time interval for the timesheet to be invoiced?

38. What is the precondition for the timesheet on the project to be billable?

39. Which stages do you have in the "My tasks" menu of the project application?

40. What do the colors at the top of each column in the project pipeline represent?

or press CTRL+Enter

✅ Answer Key

31. Yes

32. Using the dashboard reporting in projects

33. Yes by giving the customer portal access

34. Through analytical accounting

35. Status of the project

36. In the timesheet section in the task

37. True

38. Sales order has to been linked to the project

39. Inbox, This week, This month, Next month, Later, Done, Canceled

40. The status of the tasks (on track, at risk, off track, on hold, done)

Inventory Management

41. In case of dropshipping, when a quotation is confirmed:

42. If your product is tracked by serial number, when do you have to set the serial number when you buy the product?

43. Where can you configure removal strategies?

44. For deliveries, if your reservation method is set to 8 days "before scheduled date":

45. In a warehouse receiving products in 2 steps, which default destination location will you have in Odoo when receiving products from the vendor?

46. Which priority list does Odoo follow to select a putaway rule, until a match is found?

47. What is not right about resupplying methods in the warehouse?

48. Which of the following are split methods in the landed cost?

49. When is a product automatically reserved after confirming a sales order?

50. If the system shows 10 units on hand of a product and only 8 units are physically available, what quantity should we set as the counted quantity if we want to perform an inventory adjustment?

or press CTRL+Enter

✅ Answer Key

41. A RFQ and a dropship receipt are created

42. On the receipt, before validating it

43. On the storage locations and on the product categories

44. It means that products are reserved 8 days before the scheduled delivery date

45. WH/Input

46. Package type and product, Package type and product category, Package type, Product, Product category

47. Resupply from sister company

48. Equal, by quantity, by current cost, by volume

49. When the reservation method is set as "At confirmation" and you have enough free to use quantity

50. 8

Manufacturing

51. Do you need a predefined bill of materials to create/confirm a manufacturing order?

52. How many Bills of Materials can a product have?

53. How is Barcode Scanner used in Odoo?

54. What feature is used to manage residual materials left over during the manufacturing process, alongside the finished product?

55. What is the precondition to merge two manufacturing orders?

56. How can we track the different versions of bill of materials?

57. What are the options to automatically trigger a semi-finished product?

58. How should you handle a situation where you don't have enough components for a manufacturing order and need to produce only what is available?

59. Can you produce a finished product if the raw materials are not available?

60. What does the Overall Equipment Effectiveness refer to in the Manufacturing app?

or press CTRL+Enter

Human Resources

61. How do you officially release an employee from your company in the system?

62. You are a recruiter in HR, hiring a Sales Rep for one of your Sales Manager's teams. They will need to interview the candidate. In order to assign a candidate to an interviewer, you should:

63. What does the term “Source” refer to in the Recruitment App?

64. What does "Related User" in an employee profile represent?

65. Which app allows an employee to view their allocated leaves?

66. Time Off requests can only be approved by:

67. If the Timesheets field under Work Information is left empty, the approval is done by a Timesheets > Administrator or a Timesheets > User: all timesheets (as determined in the user settings). True or False?

68. If the Time Off field under Work Information is left empty, the approval is done only by HR. True or False?

69. Are you able to define your own stages and customize the steps of your recruitment process?

70. If I want to take the 1st, the 4th and the 9th of May off, I should:

or press CTRL+Enter

✅ Answer Key

61. Archive their employee profile

62. Select the candidate's application, select “Recruiter”, assign yourself, select “Interviewer”, assign your Sales Manager

63. How the applicant found out about the job

64. The user on the system in which the employee profile is associated with

65. Time Off

66. By any of these options, depending on the configuration

67. True

68. False

69. Yes

70. Do 3 separate requests

Accounting

71. Can the currency exchange rate be updated automatically?

72. What does the main screen (Dashboard) of the Odoo Accounting App show?

73. If the debit and credit amounts on a journal entry are not balanced, the entry:

74. Odoo allows companies to set up Fiscal Years of more or less than one year. These fiscal periods, nonetheless, can not overlap:

75. What account type appears on a Balance Sheet?

76. What account type appears on a Profit and Loss Statement?

77. Which of the following is not a Journal Type?

78. Each Account of Type ________ should have its own Journal.

79. Which feature allows companies to create rules that map taxes and accounts based on a partner's location and/or business type?

80. During the reconciliation process, what happens when an entry matches several reconciliation models?

or press CTRL+Enter

✅ Answer Key

71. Yes

72. Favorite Journals/All Journals

73. Can’t be saved as a draft nor posted

74. True

75. Equity

76. Expenses

77. Point of Sales (PoS)

78. Bank and Cash

79. Fiscal positions

80. The sequence of models to follow is configurable, with the first on the list having priority
